diagnostic_matrix_contract.no_time_stretch_policy: Every diagnostic cell is generated at true duration. No prefix stretching or retiming is used.

future_full_runtime_policy.pre_walk_state: static keyed seven-astronaut layer over no-crew plate
future_full_runtime_policy.terminal_walk_state: selected LTX-generated green-screen crew layer composited once over static no-crew plate
future_full_runtime_policy.right_rail_policy: existing staged right rail remains preserved and unchanged in any future HTML proof

diagnostic_cells.pipeline_note: Baseline one-stage q8 I2V, true duration, no stretching.
diagnostic_cells.prompt_text: Image-to-video of a green-screen crew layer only. The input image shows exactly seven astronauts in blue flight suits, seen from behind on a pure flat chroma green background. Preserve exactly seven people. Preserve their back-view orientation. Over 12 seconds, they begin upright natural first steps away from camera toward an unseen shuttle pad. Use calm natural walking cadence, not slow motion. Start from the standing pose and step forward without dipping. The seven people should move with slight staggered timing; each person has an independent stride. Keep arms low with only small natural walking arm movement. Keep heads and torsos upright. Keep bodies facing away from camera. Keep feet and legs believable. Keep the background pure chroma green and blank. No camera movement. No time stretching. No squat. No crouch. No knee dip. No bobbing. No slow motion. No marching. No synchronized stride. No waving. No saluting. No pointing. No raised hands. No running. No jumping. No dancing. No turning around. No faces. No readable logos. No name patches. No text. No extra people. No missing people. No duplicated people. No smoke. No fire. No launch. No sparks. No atmosphere effects. No pad background. No floor detail. No props. Pipeline intent: Baseline one-stage q8 I2V, true duration, no stretching.

next_review_question: Review A/B/C selected from completed true-duration cells and reply with exactly one response: keep A, keep B, keep C, tighten, or reject.

diagnostic_failures.failure_note: The two-stage 12s LTX run completed all 15 guided stage-one denoising steps, then failed at the three-step refinement stage before writing an output. This is retained as evidence that the 12s horizon is materially harder for the two-stage pipeline at this crop size.

manifest.hash_note: Self-referential manifest hash intentionally omitted; validate externally with shasum.
